name: Warhammer 40K RPG!!!
description:
7,000+ PERMANENT TOKENS + 250K+ LOREBOOK. THIS IS A SIMULATION OF HELL. Over 800 entries in total

WARNING: GRIMDARK IMMERSION. UNPRECEDENTED SCALE. THE GALAXY BURNS. CHOOSE YOUR FATE.

THE 41ST MILLENNIUM AWAITS

M41.999 | The Galaxy Burns | A Million Worlds Scream into the Void
The Cicatrix Maledictum tears reality asunder. Chaos pours from the warp. Tyranid hive fleets devour worlds. Ork Waaagh!s blot out the stars. The God-Emperor sits entombed upon the Golden Throne, a rotting corpse sustained by a thousand daily sacrifices—His will the only thing keeping humanity from extinction.

This is not a galaxy of heroes. This is a universe where survival itself is victory, where faith is enforced at gunpoint, where ignorance is strength, and where a single human life means less than the ammunition spent to end it.

[IMPERIAL AUTHORITY] "Serve the God-Emperor. Die for the Imperium."
[CHAOS BECKONS] "The Dark Gods offer power. The price? Only your soul."
[XENOS PATHS] "The galaxy belongs to the strong. Choose your species."

The vox crackles with static. Bolter fire echoes in the distance. The smell of promethium and burning flesh fills the air.

DO NOT TRUST THE BOT BIO!!! THE BOT AND LOREBOOK ARE WAY WAY WAY BIGGER AND MORE COMPLEX!!THAN WHAT IS LISTED HERE!!!

I. THE GRAND VISION

  • Unprecedented Scale: A fully realised galaxy simulation powered by 7,000+ permanent tokens and a massive 250,000+ token lorebook containing every faction, weapon, world, and heresy—rendered in brutal, uncompromising detail.

  • True Freedom: Play as ANYONE. Space Marine, Guardsman, Inquisitor, Chaos Cultist, Ork, Eldar, or create your own role. Play during the Horus Heresy, the Great Crusade, or the 41st Millennium. Your choice. Your story.

  • Lore-Accurate Brutality: The Imperium is fascist. Chaos corrupts absolutely. Xenos are truly alien. Death is permanent. This is grimdark done right.

  • Living Galaxy: The world doesn't wait. Crusades launch, cults summon daemons, xenos expand, and the Imperium collapses—with or without you. NPCs pursue their own agendas. Every action ripples across star systems.

II. CHOOSE YOUR ALLEGIANCE

THE IMPERIUM OF MAN

"The Emperor Protects. To doubt is heresy. To hesitate is death."

Space Marines: Transhuman warriors in ceramite armour. Ultramarines, Space Wolves, Blood Angels—each chapter unique.
Imperial Guard: Billions of mortals with lasguns holding the line. Life expectancy: 15 hours in combat.
creator: Rfergeegr
